title: Cobblemon Crossworlds
description: Catch Pokemon in Space! Modpack with Cobblemon, Infinite Dimensions, Stellaris, No Man's Craft, Bumblezone, The Aether, ProjectE, AE2, and Mekanism
body:
Get ready to experience Minecraft like never before with the ultimate modpack combining features from Cobblemon, ProjectE, AE2, Mekanism, and many more mods to build a fully featured long content pool to play with friends. 

- Catch 'Em All with Cobblemon - Enter a world where Pokémon-inspired creatures roam, ready to be captured, trained, and battled!
- Essential Mod was added to make Co-Op a total breeze. You dont need to rely on your one friend with an extra laptop who bought their own router to port forward a server for you.
- Ascend to the Heavens in The Aether – Soar through floating islands, battle divine beings, and uncover celestial treasures in this mythical sky dimension.
![Aether grasslands with Rayquaza and Tropius](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5s9PrtFX/images/a18399c50bf81c66c1513302bb5708656ce7ec20.png)

- Master Engineering with Create Dimension – Construct elaborate contraptions, automate production, and unleash limitless creativity with revolutionary machinery.![Coal Engine with Coal Block Farm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5s9PrtFX/images/97986c2d77811be9b538c9ccb7fa44e28d8dbf65.png)
- Conquer the Cosmos with No Man's Craft addon for Stellaris – Whether dominating galaxies or digging deep into chaotic new realms, the universe is yours to explore! Go to other planets that are outside the solar system in this brand new mod that harkens back to the bananaspace plugin for bukkit.
![Pokemon Gym on Lava Ocean Planet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5s9PrtFX/images/01c99fee25c3afa5a30de64cb58df66454055595.png)
- Discover the Magic of The Bumblezone - Catch Combee in the Bumblezone see spawning guide for more info [https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pok%C3%A9mon/Spawning](https://wiki.cobblemon.com/index.php/Pok%C3%A9mon/Spawning)
![Combee in front of Bee Hotel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5s9PrtFX/images/a11b5be179a4531e1d987a0d8add925ad272c561.png)
- Immerse Yourself with LabPBR and Fresh animations – Includes resource packs for Aether, Bumblezone, Confluence, and vanilla blocks.

This one-of-a-kind modpack brings together innovation, exploration, and pure excitement—where will your adventure take you? Jump in now and craft your ultimate legend!
